raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX of XXXX, I requested American Express to block several reoccurring payments/vendors and send a new card. The vendors were blocked and a new card came. 

In XXXX, the same reoccurring fees started to occur again. American Express claimed it was their fault and sent a new card. 

In XXXX, the same reoccurring fees continued - I requested my card to be cancelled. 

In XXXX, my card was not cancelled - and I was billed their {$550.00} annual fee. I withheld {$3200.00} in the final payment and the card was cancelled. 

All I want to happen at this point is for the {$550.00} fee to be removed ( which is not owed ) and I'll pay off the balance. 

American Express told me ( after being a large customer for 14 years ) that no one in the company can remove the fee, provide records that I ever called, and that I will be charged for penalties and interest for years to come.
